'''Borcorash''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with incredibly beautiful sunsets with an ever-shifting array of colors brought about by [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] conditions. It was the [[blufferavian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. The planet was the location of the high-tech [[Resinem Entertainment Complex]]. The bombing of a neighboring rival [[Casino/Legends|casino]] shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] damaged the Complex's west wall, which was further damaged by erosion. The Complex was run by [[Mazzic]]. The [[Mistryl Shadow Guard|Mistryl]] sent [[Karoly D'ulin]] to recover [[Shada D'ukal]] from the Complex. Shada defeated and escaped from Karoly, fleeing to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
